subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Thou seest me wandering in the wilderness of yearning and consumed by the fires of separation, and resurrection's hour hath come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب ترانی هائما فی بیداء الاشتیاق و محترقا بنیران الفراق و قامت قیامه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
